briefing.arm: Arm shares surged on the announcement of its first in-house AGI CPU for AI data centers, with $15B annual revenue projected.
briefing.sk_hynix: SK Hynix confidentially filed for a U.S. listing aiming for $14B to expand production amid high AI demand.
briefing.cisco: Cisco shares faced pressure despite strong Q2 earnings due to margin concerns; focusing on new AI agent security portfolio to drive growth.
briefing.openai: OpenAI is securing a massive financing round at an $850B valuation, though investors remain skeptical about the long-term break-even timeline.
briefing.market_sentiment: Market sentiment has shifted from anticipating potential to demanding concrete proof of returns, while AI infrastructure spending continues to scale.
